264 H0500_BWL_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0500_BWL_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0500 Bowel Toileting Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether a bowel toileting program is being utilized to manage the resident's bowel continence. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
9=Unable to Determine
